title: lazarum angustilobum
intro: Lazarum angustilobum, also known as the Narrow-leafed Lazarum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lazarum angustilobum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lazarum angustilobum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
